input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8743 [Automation] java run fails for org.clojure:google-closure-library-third-party:0.0-1376-2; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Adding org.clojure:google-closure-library would make core resources visible but would mask an overbroad test assumption rather than being required for meaningful coverage of google-closure-library-third-party.
Tests should focus on resources actually packaged by google-closure-library-third-party, such as goog/caja, goog/dojo, goog/mochikit, goog/loremipsum, goog/osapi, and goog/silverlight files.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: the artifact has no declared Maven dependencies and directly packages the third-party Closure resource files. The observed failure is from a test expecting core Closure resources such as goog/base.js/goog/deps.js, which belong to the companion google-closure-library artifact, not this third-party artifact.
